name: Barfresh Food Group, Inc.
summary: Barfresh Food Group, Inc. manufactures and distributes ready to blend frozen beverages in the United States. The company offers portion controlled and ready to blend beverage ingredient packs for smoothies, shakes, frappes, cocktails, and mocktails. It primarily serves the restaurant chains and the foodservice industry. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Los Angeles, California.
